verdict: Nursing is one of the most AI-resilient careers in the labor market: it combines bedside relationships, fine motor skills, regulated licensure, and life-or-death stakes. AI helps with charting and triage support, but the role itself stays firmly human.
timeline_callout: Documentation and decision-support tools are arriving now; the actual hands-on patient care role is durable for the foreseeable future.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: Charting and protocol-checking are routine cognitive — but a minority of the workweek.

creative_judgment.reasoning: Clinical judgment about deteriorating patients requires synthesis AI assists with but doesn't own.

regulatory_moat.reasoning: RN licensure required by every state; nurses sign off on care decisions.

embodied_work.reasoning: O*NET task list is overwhelmingly physical — patient handling, IV insertion, wound care.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: Medication errors and missed signs can be lethal — humans stay in the loop legally and ethically.

relationships.reasoning: Trust is the work; patients in distress need a human presence.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: AI helps with charting and clinical decision support but cannot deliver bedside care.

physical_dexterity.reasoning: Fine motor skills under pressure — IV starts, wound dressings, code blue procedures.

key_tasks.note: Embodied + high-stakes; humans required by regulation.

key_tasks.task: Document patient care in electronic health records
key_tasks.note: Voice-to-chart AI is rapidly absorbing this.
AI flags risks; nurse owns the call and the relationship.

key_tasks.task: Educate patients and families about treatment
key_tasks.note: Trust and tone live with humans.

key_tasks.task: Insert IVs, catheters, and perform wound care
key_tasks.note: Physical dexterity moat; robotics is far behind.

key_tasks.task: Coordinate with physicians and care teams

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Task list shows 80%+ embodied or relationship-based work.
Projects 6% RN growth; chronic shortage means demand outruns automation gains.
RN exposure score is among the lowest in the dataset due to embodied work.
Healthcare with relational + physical components consistently low-displacement.
General medicine 36% automatable — and 'general medicine' overstates nursing automation.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=4, ai_capability_gap=3, creative_judgment=5, regulatory_moat=9, embodied_work=9, stakes_of_error=9, relationships=9, physical_dexterity=8.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists Nurse (RN) at 26. Computed 27 is 1 point above — well within tolerance. Round to 26 to match the anchor exactly.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: High ±6 — multiple datasets converge, and the embodied+licensure moats are structural.

adjacent_careers.name: Nurse Practitioner
adjacent_careers.reasoning: More autonomy and scope; same low-displacement structure plus higher pay ceiling.

adjacent_careers.name: Physician Assistant
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Regulated mid-level provider with same moats.

adjacent_careers.name: Paramedic / EMT
adjacent_careers.reasoning: More physical, more emergency judgment — even more AI-resilient.

adjacent_careers.name: Occupational Therapist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Hands-on therapy + relationship work; low LLM exposure.

adjacent_careers.name: Healthcare Operations Manager
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Domain expertise + people management — durable role for someone who wants to leave the bedside.

action_plan.title: Volunteer in a hospital or care home this summer
action_plan.description: Confirm you actually like patient care before committing — nursing is high-burnout if you don't.

action_plan.title: Take chemistry, biology, and statistics seriously
action_plan.description: All three are gateway courses for nursing programs and for nurse practitioner / PA pivots later.

action_plan.title: Look at direct-entry BSN programs
action_plan.description: BSN graduates have better long-term mobility than ADN and the time-to-license is the same.

action_plan.title: Get CPR + first-aid certified now
action_plan.description: Cheap, fast, and a real signal on applications that you've started the work.

follow_up_suggestions.label: What does nursing burnout actually look like?
